title: Vervain's Integrated Modpack for Performance
description: A small Performance and QoL Modpack (originally made for the Vervain's Arcadia Community)
body:
This modpack is a general purpose modpack to improve the performance on the client-side over the vanilla client. It contains purely clientside mods and should therefor work on pretty much any server, be it Vanilla, Fabric, Paper, etc. **Built using Fabric!**
This modpack is built ontop of Fabric, which is more performant than Forge and has great overall mod support.

**Built with weaker machines in mind!**
It is a small modpack and besides Bobby *(which can be turned off ingame)*, improves overall performance vs the vanilla client. If you are looking for a small QoL and client-side addons modpack, this is the pack for you! **Mods worth pointing out:** - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) + the usual additions, like [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) / [RyoamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/ryoamiclights) - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Xaero's [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) It is the continuation of a [Curseforge project](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/vervains-integrated-performance-pack). The pack has been rebuilt with the available mods on Moddrinth, since Sodium and a few more have left Curseforge. The CF version of the pack therefore won't be updated in the future.
Originally created as a custom performance pack for the Vervain Community [Homepage](https://vervainglobal.com/mc) If you are looking for an 18+ LGBTQ+ Minecraft community with a long established world (Started at the end of 2020, no reset so far from 1.16.5 to now), feel free to apply on the homepage! Are you not much of a Survival player and prefer Creative instead? We also have that!
Just recently we re-opened our Creative Server with PlotSquared, so anything you build is safe from griefers!
Even a minigames server is part of our small network, so if you have something you want to play hop on there 😊
